Finger Rings 25K - 50K Footer

Discover Elegant Gold and Diamond Rings Rs.25,000 to Rs.50,000

Within the thoughtfully curated band of rings under 30000 and rings under 50000, Tanishq offers gold and diamond designs that feel refined, modern, and deeply Indian at heart. This price range is ideal if you want unmistakable quality and design finesse without straying into extravagant budgets.

Exquisite Gold Rings

  • Classic Gold Rings: In the gold rings under 50000 options, you’ll find elegant bands, textured designs, and subtle patterns that sit comfortably on the hand and pair well with both ethnic and western wear. There are also well-finished gold rings under 30000 that showcase the warmth of gold in clean silhouettes, ideal for daily use or gifting.
  • Gold Wedding Rings: Wedding bands in this range focus on comfort-fit profiles, crisp engravings, and polished finishes. A gold ring for men under 30000 is perfect if you prefer a dignified, understated band that still carries the weight of tradition and craftsmanship.
  • Gold Rings with Gemstone: If you enjoy a hint of colour, gold rings with gemstones add personality, from soft pastels to richer jewel tones. These pieces sit beautifully alongside ornate styles like sui dhaga earrings design gold or kundan earrings for women.

Stunning Diamond Rings Rs.25,000 to Rs.50,000

  • Diamond Solitaire Rings: Within diamond rings under 50000, solitaire designs showcase a single diamond with carefully considered proportions and settings. For more compact budgets, a well-cut diamond ring under 30000 can still offer remarkable brilliance and everyday wearability.
  • Diamond Cluster Rings: Cluster styles create the illusion of a larger solitaire by arranging many smaller stones in artistic patterns. This is where diamond rings under 50000 really shine - giving you a statement look with a smart use of carat weight and design.

Men’s Gold and Diamond Rings Rs.25,000 to Rs.50,000

Men will find solid, confident designs in both metal-only bands and diamond-accented rings. From sleek brushed finishes to angular motifs, the assortments of gold rings under 50000 include options that feel masculine yet refined, suitable for office wear, rituals, and everyday use.

Women’s Gold and Diamond Rings Rs.25,000 to Rs.50,000

For women, this bracket covers delicate daily-wear bands, semi-bridal pieces, and contemporary statement rings. Many of these sit beautifully alongside bangles and necklaces, letting you create layered looks while staying within gold jewellery under 50000 and diamond rings under 50000 segments.

Trending Ring Designs Rs.25,000 to Rs.50,000

  • Minimalist Gold and Diamond Rings: Minimal styling is popular right now, and this range includes slender bands, negative-space motifs, and tiny diamond accents that quietly elevate every outfit.
  • Stackable Rings: Stackables allow you to mix metals, textures, and stone settings. Building a personal stack from rings under 30000 means you can add one ring at a time - marking achievements or memories without a large one-time spend.
  • Gold and Diamond Rings with Unique Settings: From bypass bands to asymmetric clusters, unique settings give you a designer look while keeping pricing within accessible brackets like rings under 50000.

Affordable Gold and Diamond Rings Rs.25,000 to Rs.50,000

The immense ring collection here at Tanishq boasts smart design and responsible use of gold and diamonds, without compromising on finish. You can explore gold jewellery under 50000 as well as focussed pockets such as gold rings under 30000 or a single diamond ring under 30000, and still own certified, well-finished jewellery.

Shop by Style - Gold and Diamond Rings for Every Taste

Whether your heart leans towards a slim diamond band, a bold men’s ring, or a gemstone-accented gold design, this segment offers many ways to express your style. Thoughtfully browsing this price band helps you discover gold rings under 50000, diamond rings under 50000, and other designs that feel luxurious, meaningful, and comfortably within reach.

Reimagine Your Old Gold with Tanishq's Exchange Program

Tanishq's Exchange Program enables customers to trade in their old gold from any jeweller for newer designs, at the same time ensuring they receive the best possible value for their gold.
